title: Dashboard
subtitle: Your bricks at a glance
emptyHint: Add a brick to get started.

addSheet.title: Add Brick
addSheet.description: Choose a brick to add to your dashboard.
addSheet.empty: No brick types available. Install a plugin that provides bricks.

config.title: Configure Brick
config.noOptions: This brick type has no configurable options.

dashboard.newDescription: Create a new dashboard to organize your bricks.
dashboard.editDescription: Customize your dashboard's name and icon.
dashboard.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this dashboard and remove all its bricks. This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.iconHint: Enter a Lucide icon name (e.g. home, chart-bar, settings).
